title: MCP Server Configuration
description: Configuration for a single MCP server.

transport.description: Transport type. Auto-detected from 'command' (stdio) or 'url' (sse) if omitted.

command.description: Command to run for stdio transport.

env.description: Environment variables for the stdio command.

cwd.description: Working directory for the stdio command.

url.description: URL for sse or streamable-http transport.

headers.description: HTTP headers for sse or streamable-http transport.

prefix.description: Prefix to apply to tool names from this server.

startup_timeout.description: Timeout in seconds for server initialization. Defaults to 30.

tool_filters.description: Filters for controlling which tools are loaded.

allowed.description: List of regex patterns for tools to include.

rejected.description: List of regex patterns for tools to exclude.
